_comment: Optional controls for journey-forge. include/exclude are JS regex matched case-insensitively against the URL PATH (e.g. /get-care/news/back-pain). Empty arrays = no filtering (all sitemap URLs). Use exclude to drop staging test/sandbox/preview pages. CLI flags --include/--exclude override these. You may also add "sitemap", "minCluster", "sectionDepth" here as defaults so `npm run forge:parse` can run with no args.
